title: Xp Stealer
description: A mod that adds the feature of stealing XP from other players when you kill them.
body:
You steal XP levels from other players you kill. The percentage you take from them is configurable via a command, the default is 45%.
The command is "/SetXpPercent numberhere" you can put in values from 1 - 0.01 (100% - 1%) into the command.
